data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for assignment of staff/resources to counters by shift.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for the assignment of staff/resources to counters by shift. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for this assignment but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation or validation, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of assignment of staff/resources to counters by shift.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the assignment of staff/resources to counters by shift.
